badge_awards.badge_criteria: Awarded by the app when a player unlocks a gold avatar drop from earning a badge
Player wins a fast hands battle at the kitchen line with quick reflexes and shot selection
badge_awards.gemini_reason: Ironvarr wins a fast hands battle at the kitchen line, hitting the final winning volley.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Player executes 3 or more quality dinks at the kitchen line in a single rally
badge_awards.gemini_reason: Ironvarr executes three quality dinks at the kitchen line during the rally.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Player goes through the entire clip without making an unforced error
badge_awards.gemini_reason: Ironvarr participates in a long rally with multiple dinks and volleys without committing an unforced error.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Players tap paddles together with their partner after winning a point
badge_awards.gemini_reason: Ironvarr taps paddles with his partner immediately after winning the point.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Players from both teams shake hands, fist bump, or show mutual respect after a point or at the end of a game
badge_awards.gemini_reason: Players from both teams meet at the net to tap paddles and show mutual respect after the point ends.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Both sides sustain a rally of 15 or more consecutive shots back and forth
badge_awards.gemini_reason: The rally consists of over 15 consecutive shots, starting from the serve and ending with a winning volley.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Players sustain a rally of 8 or more consecutive shots without an error
badge_awards.gemini_reason: The players sustain a long rally of approximately 18 shots without an error until the final point.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Player makes an exceptional, crowd-pleasing play that would be worthy of a highlight reel
badge_awards.gemini_reason: The point is an exceptional display of patience, dinking, and fast-reflex volleying, culminating in a clean winner.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Partners work together over multiple shots to systematically break down the opponents and win the point
badge_awards.gemini_reason: Ironvarr and his partner work together through a long dink rally and a firefight to systematically win the point.

badge_awards.badge_criteria: Both partners advance to the kitchen line together and win the point with coordinated net play
badge_awards.gemini_reason: Ironvarr and his partner both advance to and maintain position at the kitchen line to win the point.
